name: Adaptec, Inc.
description: Adaptec, Inc. was a prominent technology company that designed, manufactured, and marketed storage solutions, including host bus adapters, RAID controllers, and storage management software. Founded in 1981, the company played a critical role in the development of SCSI technology, enabling high-performance data transfer between computers and peripheral devices. Adaptec's products were widely used in enterprise servers, workstations, and storage systems to improve data availability and system performance. In 2010, Adaptec's hardware business was acquired by PMC-Sierra, which was later acquired by Microsemi and subsequently Microchip Technology.
